care_facilities.name: Midtown Children's Pediatric ER
care_facilities.description: Dedicated pediatric emergency department serving infants through teens with onsite pediatric specialists.
care_facilities.notes: Primary pediatric ER suggested for families in ZIP 30309.

care_facilities.name: Peachtree Kids Emergency Center
care_facilities.description: Community-based pediatric emergency center with child-friendly environment.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Open 24 hours a day for pediatric emergencies.
care_facilities.notes: Also offers on-site social work and family support services.

care_facilities.name: Midtown Pediatric Urgent Care
care_facilities.description: Walk-in urgent care for children with evening and weekend hours.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Open 10 AM–10 PM weekdays, 10 AM–8 PM weekends.
care_facilities.notes: Commonly recommended for mild to moderate pediatric issues after hours.

care_facilities.name: Atlanta Midtown General Hospital ER
care_facilities.description: Full-service emergency department for adults and children.
care_facilities.hours_notes: ER entrance on Spring St; open 24/7.
care_facilities.notes: Has a separate fast-track for low-acuity pediatric cases.

care_facilities.name: Downtown Seattle Infant & Child Urgent Care
care_facilities.description: Same-day pediatric urgent care a short walk from downtown Seattle.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Open daily; closed on major holidays.
care_facilities.notes: Frequently listed as follow-up option after using the symptom checker in Seattle.

care_facilities.name: Seattle Children's North Clinic
care_facilities.description: Outpatient pediatric clinic offering primary and specialty care.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Open Monday–Friday, closed weekends and holidays.
care_facilities.notes: Not an emergency facility; appointments recommended.

care_facilities.name: Downtown Seattle General Hospital ER
care_facilities.description: Large urban emergency department serving all ages.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Level II trauma center; ER open 24/7.
care_facilities.notes: Shows up as a nearby ER when generating babysitter info sheets in Seattle.

care_facilities.name: River North Pediatric Urgent Care
care_facilities.description: Walk-in pediatric urgent care convenient to River North and Old Town.
care_facilities.notes: Often recommended for non-emergency evening care for young children in ZIP 60610.

care_facilities.name: Chicago Downtown Emergency Center
care_facilities.description: Community emergency center primarily serving adults; stabilizes pediatric emergencies.
care_facilities.notes: Appears as an option when selecting 'Nearest ER' on tools and checklists for Chicago ZIPs.

care_facilities.name: Mission Family Health Clinic
care_facilities.description: Neighborhood family clinic offering pediatric primary care in the Mission District.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Limited weekend hours for urgent same-day needs.
care_facilities.notes: Staff can help families enroll in Medi-Cal and other programs.

care_facilities.name: San Francisco General Hospital ER
care_facilities.description: County hospital emergency department serving all ages, including pediatric emergencies.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Emergency department and trauma center open 24/7.
care_facilities.notes: Frequently listed as nearest ER for Mission District families.

care_facilities.name: Dallas Downtown Children's ER
care_facilities.description: Pediatric emergency room near downtown Dallas with child life specialists on staff.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Pediatric ED open 24/7; free parking in attached garage.
care_facilities.notes: Shows as the nearest pediatric ER when searching from ZIP 75201.

care_facilities.name: 24/7 Children's Nurse Advice Line
care_facilities.description: Phone-based pediatric nurse advice line for non-emergency questions, available nationwide.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Available by phone 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
care_facilities.notes: Common recommended option from the symptom checker for mild pediatric symptoms.

care_facilities.name: FamilyCare Walk-In Clinic
care_facilities.description: Family urgent care clinic treating adults and children 6 months and older.
care_facilities.hours_notes: Walk-in only; last patient accepted 30 minutes before closing.
care_facilities.notes: May appear as the first ER/urgent care option in generic location pickers.

classes.title: Infant CPR & Choking Response (Downtown Morning Session)
classes.description: Hands-on class teaching CPR and choking response for infants up to 12 months. Designed for parents and caregivers.

classes.title: Infant CPR for Parents & Grandparents (Midday Session)
classes.description: Free community class covering infant CPR, choking hazards, and basic home safety.

classes.title: Small-Group Infant CPR & First Aid
classes.description: Comprehensive infant CPR and first aid training with certification card upon completion.

classes.title: Weekend Infant CPR Intensive
classes.description: Intensive infant CPR workshop for expectant and new parents covering emergencies in the first year.

classes.title: Teen Babysitter CPR & Safety
classes.description: CPR and basic first aid for teens who babysit infants and young children.

classes.title: Parenting Basics: Life with a Newborn
classes.description: Practical tips for feeding, sleep, and soothing during the first 3 months.

classes.title: Prenatal Care 3-Week Series
classes.description: Three-session series on prenatal health, labor preparation, and postpartum recovery.

classes.title: Home Safety for Toddlers
classes.description: Learn how to toddler-proof your home and prevent common injuries.
classes.location_name: Downtown Dallas Children's ER Education Room

classes.title: Live Online Infant CPR Webinar
classes.description: Virtual instructor-led infant CPR training you can attend from home.

daycare_providers.name: Gold Coast Children's Center
daycare_providers.description: Licensed daycare and preschool serving infants through pre-K with play-based curriculum.

daycare_providers.name: Lakeshore Learning Loft
daycare_providers.description: Full-day childcare with extended evening hours for working parents.

daycare_providers.name: Old Town Daycare & Preschool
daycare_providers.description: Neighborhood daycare with small class sizes and outdoor play yard.

daycare_providers.name: River North Kids Academy
daycare_providers.description: Curriculum-focused daycare with music and language enrichment.

daycare_providers.name: Near North Children's House
daycare_providers.description: Montessori-inspired childcare program for toddlers and preschoolers.

daycare_providers.name: Midtown Day School
daycare_providers.description: Center-based care near Atlanta's Midtown area with flexible drop-off times.

daycare_providers.name: Peachtree Tots Learning Center
daycare_providers.description: Play-based learning with weekly music and movement classes.

daycare_providers.name: Little Sprouts Childcare Center
daycare_providers.description: Licensed center near downtown Seattle with part-time and full-time options.

daycare_providers.name: Mission Kids Co-op
daycare_providers.description: Parent cooperative daycare emphasizing community and bilingual learning.

daycare_providers.name: Downtown Dallas Childcare Center
daycare_providers.description: Center-based daycare steps from major downtown employers.

daycare_providers.name: Evening Care Center at General Hospital
daycare_providers.description: Hospital-affiliated evening childcare for staff and nearby families.

hotlines.name: Teen Support Warmline (Phone & Chat)
hotlines.description: Non-judgmental support for teens dealing with stress, anxiety, relationships, or sadness.
hotlines.hours_description: Open daily from 3 PM to 11 PM local time.
hotlines.notes: Chat available; staffed by trained counselors and supervised peers.

hotlines.name: Evening Youth Counseling Line
hotlines.description: Confidential phone counseling for youth ages 12–18 on school, family, or emotional issues.
hotlines.hours_description: Mon–Fri, 5 PM–10 PM; Sat–Sun, 4 PM–9 PM.
hotlines.notes: Not for immediate danger; will refer to local crisis services if needed.

hotlines.name: 24/7 Teen Mental Health Helpline
hotlines.description: Around-the-clock emotional support for teens experiencing anxiety, depression, or thoughts of self-harm.
hotlines.hours_description: Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
hotlines.notes: Can conference in a parent or trusted adult with teen's permission.

hotlines.name: Teen Talk Online Chat
hotlines.description: Chat-only support for teens who prefer typing instead of talking on the phone.
hotlines.hours_description: Open 2 PM– midnight, 7 days a week.
hotlines.notes: Good option for teens without private phone access.

hotlines.name: National Crisis Lifeline
hotlines.description: 24/7 crisis line for anyone in emotional distress or thinking about self-harm.
hotlines.notes: For immediate safety concerns; will connect callers to local crisis centers.

hotlines.name: Family Safety Domestic Violence Hotline
hotlines.description: Confidential safety planning and resources for those experiencing relationship abuse.
hotlines.notes: Can help locate emergency shelter and legal resources.

hotlines.name: Parent Line for Youth Substance Use
hotlines.description: Coaching and support for parents worried about a teen's alcohol or drug use.
hotlines.hours_description: Mon–Thu, 12 PM–9 PM; Fri, 12 PM–6 PM.
hotlines.notes: Not a crisis line; schedule callbacks outside posted hours.

hotlines.name: Parenting Support & Stress Line
hotlines.description: Talk with trained volunteers about parenting stress, tantrums, sleep, and more.
hotlines.hours_description: Daily 9 AM–9 PM; voicemail and online form after hours.
hotlines.notes: Good resource for parents seeking non-judgmental support.

hotlines.name: School Counselor Connect Line
hotlines.description: Connects teens to school-based counselors and local mental health services.
hotlines.notes: Can coordinate with school staff during school hours.

hotlines.name: Community Services Information Helpline
hotlines.description: Information and referrals for a wide range of community and social services.
hotlines.notes: Useful for locating local counseling, food, and housing resources.

local_resources.name: Main Street Garden Park
local_resources.description: Downtown park with a fenced children's play area, splash pad, and public restrooms.
local_resources.hours_description: Open daily 6 AM–11 PM; playground open during park hours.

local_resources.name: Klyde Warren Park Playground
local_resources.description: Popular urban park featuring a fenced children's park, food trucks, and clean restrooms.
local_resources.hours_description: Open 6 AM–11 PM daily; playground area closes at dusk.

local_resources.name: Reunion Park Playground
local_resources.description: Neighborhood park with a small fenced playground and picnic tables.
local_resources.hours_description: Sunrise to sunset; restrooms open 8 AM–8 PM.

local_resources.name: City Hall Plaza Play Area
local_resources.description: Small urban play structure behind City Hall; partially fenced.
local_resources.hours_description: Open daily 7 AM–9 PM; restrooms inside City Hall during business hours.

local_resources.name: Central Community Library
local_resources.description: Public library with children's area and community meeting rooms.
local_resources.hours_description: Mon–Thu 9 AM–8 PM; Fri–Sat 9 AM–5 PM; Sun 1 PM–5 PM.

local_resources.name: Greenwood Park Shelter
local_resources.description: Neighborhood park with covered shelter, grills, and open play field.
local_resources.hours_description: Open 6 AM–11 PM; shelter available for reservations.

local_resources.name: Mission Neighborhood Community Center
local_resources.description: Family-focused community center offering parenting classes and after-school programs.
local_resources.hours_description: Mon–Fri 9 AM–9 PM; Sat 10 AM–4 PM; closed Sun.

local_resources.name: Seattle Central Library
local_resources.description: Downtown library with children's floor, story times, and study spaces.
local_resources.hours_description: Mon–Thu 10 AM–8 PM; Fri–Sat 10 AM–6 PM; Sun 12 PM–6 PM.

local_resources.name: Mission Branch Library
local_resources.description: Local branch library offering bilingual storytimes and family programs.
local_resources.hours_description: Tue–Thu 10 AM–8 PM; Fri–Sat 1 PM–6 PM; closed Sun–Mon.

local_resources.name: Downtown Family Shelter
local_resources.description: Emergency shelter providing temporary housing and support for families.
local_resources.hours_description: Intake hours 9 AM–8 PM; shelter open 24/7 for residents.

local_resources.name: Midtown Parent Resource Center
local_resources.description: Drop-in space for parents with classes, support groups, and a small indoor play area.
local_resources.hours_description: Mon–Sat 9 AM–6 PM; evening classes as scheduled.

local_resources.name: Community Information Center
local_resources.description: Provides printed guides, maps, and resource lists for local families.
local_resources.hours_description: Mon–Fri 9 AM–5 PM; closed weekends and holidays.

support_groups.name: Mission Evening Breastfeeding Support Circle
support_groups.description: Drop-in group for breastfeeding and chestfeeding parents to ask questions and share experiences. La Leche League–style peer support with lactation consultant on rotation.

support_groups.name: Midtown Morning New Parent & Breastfeeding Group
support_groups.description: Weekly morning meet-up for parents of babies 0–6 months. Mix of breastfeeding support and general new-parent topics.

support_groups.name: Online Breastfeeding Support Group (Evenings)
support_groups.description: Virtual breastfeeding support group for parents who prefer to join from home. Led by an IBCLC.

support_groups.name: Mission Postpartum Support Group
support_groups.description: Supportive space for parents adjusting to life after birth, including discussions on mood changes, relationships, and self-care.

support_groups.name: Saturday Parenting Support & Play
support_groups.description: Weekly drop-in group for parents to connect while children play nearby.

support_groups.name: Dallas Lunchtime Breastfeeding Meetup
support_groups.description: Informal lunchtime meet-up for breastfeeding parents working or living downtown.
support_groups.location_name: Downtown Dallas Children's ER Education Room

support_groups.name: Parents Grief & Loss Support Group
support_groups.description: Facilitated support group for parents who have experienced miscarriage, stillbirth, or infant loss.

support_groups.name: General Parenting Meetups (All Groups Index)
support_groups.description: Placeholder record representing the 'all groups' category for navigation and filtering.
